title: "Birthday Card for Mum – With Love to a Wonderful Mother – Elegant Pink Floral Greeting Card with Heartfelt Verse – Perfect for Mum’s Birthday"
features: Generous Size: Extra large 12 x 8 inches card format perfect for making a big impression on your special mum's birthday celebration
Modern Design: Beautiful contemporary floral pattern that brings a fresh and stylish aesthetic to this heartfelt birthday greeting
Extended Content: Features an 8-page insert providing ample space to write personal messages and heartfelt birthday wishes
Premium Quality: Expertly crafted greeting card with high-quality materials ensuring your sentiment is delivered in style
Personal Touch: Thoughtfully designed specifically for mothers, making it an ideal choice for expressing love and appreciation on their birthday
description: Make your mum's special day even more memorable with this beautifully designed extra large birthday card. Featuring a modern floral design, this generously sized card measures 12 x 8 inches, making it a striking statement piece. The card includes an impressive 8-page insert, providing ample space for your heartfelt messages and wishes. Perfect for expressing your love and appreciation, this elegant greeting card combines contemporary style with thoughtful functionality.
